app.name: Hub POS
hubSettings.title: Hub features
hubSettings.subtitle: Enable or disable POS capabilities for all terminals (dev ops only).
hubSettings.devOpsOnly: Hub features are available on the dev ops account only.
dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.executiveSubtitle: Business performance, venue comparison, and key events across your portfolio.
dashboard.venuePerformanceOpsHint: Open tables and active orders by venue
dashboard.alertQuietFloor: No open tables or active orders right now.
dashboard.operationsSubtitle: Today's sales, live operations, and recent changes across your venues.
dashboard.recentChangesHint: Refunds, discounts, config updates, and shift events from the last 3 days
dashboard.noRecentChanges: No business changes in the last 3 days
dashboard.noVenueData: No venue data for this scope
dashboard.installHint: For fullscreen on iPhone, use Share → Add to Home Screen.
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Here's what's happening across your venues today.
dashboard.insightTrendUp: Net sales are up {{percent}}% versus the previous period.
dashboard.insightTrendDown: Net sales are down {{percent}}% versus the previous period.
dashboard.insightNoData: Not enough data yet to surface insights.
dashboard.smartAlertsHint: Things that may need your attention
dashboard.allClearHint: No alerts right now — everything looks healthy.
dashboard.alertSalesDown: Net sales dropped {{percent}}% compared to the previous period.
dashboard.alertNoSales: No sales have been recorded yet today.
dashboard.attentionHint: Issues that may need executive review
dashboard.attention.revenueDropWeek: Weekly net sales dropped {{percent}}% compared to last week.
dashboard.attention.revenueDropDay: Today's net sales are down {{percent}}% versus yesterday.
dashboard.attention.refundSpike: Refund activity increased significantly today ({{count}} refunds).
dashboard.attention.terminalsOffline: {{count}} terminals are offline across your venues.
dashboard.attention.venueLowVolume: {{venue}} has unusually low transaction volume today.
dashboard.attention.voidSpike: {{count}} voided orders detected today — review floor activity.
dashboard.attention.crossVenueGrowth: Cross-venue billing volume increased to {{count}} settlements this week.
dashboard.revenuePerformanceHint: Daily and weekly net revenue after refunds
dashboard.venueRankingHint: Compare revenue, transactions, and growth by venue
dashboard.financialHealthHint: Refunds, payment mix, and cross-venue volume
dashboard.financialRestrictedHint: Revenue and P&L are available only to the owner account.
dashboard.operationsSnapshotHint: High-level operational status — not a control panel
dashboard.executiveQuickNavHint: Jump to analytics or a dashboard section
metrics.title: Live overview
metrics.subtitle: Real-time sales and open tables across your venues.
metrics.ordersPerMinuteHint: Rolling average from the last 60 minutes
metrics.venueSummary: {{revenue}} EGP revenue · {{orders}} active orders · {{tables}} open tables
analytics.title: Revenue analytics
analytics.subtitle: Revenue by venue, category, and item with period comparison.
analytics.drillHint: Click a bar to drill into its items.
analytics.customHint: Choose a start and end date to view revenue for that period.
orders.title: Order explorer
orders.subtitle: Search and investigate orders across your venues.
orders.subtitleGrouped: Orders are grouped by cheque — each row is one tab with all its rounds.
orders.subtitleByShift: Cheques are grouped by cashier shift — each section is one shift with all its tabs.
orders.selectCheque: Select a cheque to view all orders and line items
orders.selectOrder: Select an order to view details
orders.chequeNotInListHint: This cheque is not in the current list (filters or shift may hide it). Details and actions are still available on the right.
pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.agentUnreachable: Local agent unreachable — restart the till service
pos.offlineLeader: Offline — this till is the lead
pos.offlineRelay: Offline — relaying via peer with internet
pos.syncFailedHint: These events could not reach the hub. Retry after fixing the issue, or dismiss if already handled manually.
pos.syncFailedLoadError: Could not load failed sync queue
pos.menuNotCached: Menu not cached — connect to hub to sync menu
pos.menuStale: Menu update available — sync before new orders
pos.offline.refundRequiresHub: Refunds require hub connection — try again when online
pos.actionsEmpty: No actions available for this cheque right now
pos.addItemsHint: Add items to send or pay
pos.noTableSelectedHint: Dine in picks a table; Take away uses the shared counter
pos.selectTableForMenu: Select a table to start ordering
pos.floorSubtitleAssigned: Tap a free table to open a cheque, or a busy one to resume
pos.floorSubtitleOpenOnly: Open cheques only — ask your manager to assign tables in settings
pos.noTablesConfiguredHint: Hub manager can assign tables in Venue settings
pos.payCardManualHint: Customer paid on your external terminal — record the amount here.
pos.paySplitHint: Enter cash or card — the other amount fills automatically.
pos.splitSelectItems: Assign each item to a guest (one row per unit)
pos.splitAmountHint: Enter amounts that add up to {{total}} EGP
pos.splitPrintHint: Print one full table check or a separate receipt for each guest before collecting payment.
pos.splitSettleHint: Each guest pays for their items. The table stays open until every portion is paid.
pos.transferHint: Select fired lines and the destination table. Manager PIN required.
pos.moveTableHint: Select a free table to move the current cheque to.
pos.tablesSubtitle: Switch between open tables or start a new one
pos.newTableHint: Opens a new table. Remove empty tables with the ✕ on each card.
pos.deleteTableHint: Close this empty table with no queued or fired items
pos.switchTableConfirmBody: {{from}} still has items. Switch to {{to}} anyway?
pos.orderLocked: Order already sent — start a new order
pos.sendFailed: Could not send order to kitchen
pos.openDrawerNoShift: Open a shift before using the cash drawer
pos.orderLookupSubtitle: Search past cheques and reprint receipts.
pos.orderLookupSelect: Select a cheque to view rounds and line items.
pos.selectServiceForMenu: Choose Dine in or Take away to start ordering
pos.shiftOpenHint: Declare the cash in your drawer before taking payments.
pos.shiftOpenOpenCheques: {{count}} open table(s) from a previous session — you can still start the shift.
pos.shiftRequiredBanner: Open a shift to take payments.
pos.shiftCloseHint: Count cash in the drawer and enter the total.
pos.updateShiftCloseHint: Install after shift close when the till is idle.
pos.pinLoginHint: Use the PIN assigned by your manager
pos.pinKeyboardHint: Type your PIN with the keyboard or use the keypad below
pos.logoutConfirmHint: You will return to the PIN screen. Any unsaved work on this terminal is cleared.
pos.logoutBlockedShift: You have an open shift. Close it before signing out.
pos.discountHint: Subtotal {{total}} EGP — restaurant manager initiates, general manager approves.
pos.discountApplyHint: Venue manager PIN required. Action is logged for general manager review.
pos.refundPickHint: Choose a recently paid cheque to refund.
pos.refundInvalidPin: Invalid floor manager PIN — use the shift manager PIN for this venue (demo: 7777).
pos.refundPinHint: Floor manager PIN required to authorize this refund (demo: 7777).
pos.refundPinOptional: Optional — leave blank to process as cashier; floor manager and hub are notified in Activity.
pos.refundReasonRequired: Enter a refund reason before submitting.
pos.refundAmountInvalid: Refund amount is outside the allowed limit for this payment method.
pos.discountPinOptional: Optional floor manager PIN — action is logged and managers are notified.
pos.discountReasonRequired: Enter a discount reason before submitting.
pos.discountAmountInvalid: Discount amount must be greater than zero and not exceed the subtotal.
pos.refundNothingLeft: This cheque has already been fully refunded.
pos.refundReasonPlaceholder: Describe why this refund is being issued
pos.refundNotification: Refund on cheque #{{number}}: {{amount}} EGP ({{method}}) — authorized by {{manager}}
pos.floorManagerPinHint: Shift manager PIN for this venue (demo: 7777)
pos.discountInvalidPin: Invalid floor manager PIN — use the shift manager PIN for this venue (demo: 7777)
pos.discountClearDraftFirst: Send or clear the current round before applying a discount
pos.discountEditHint: Current discount: {{amount}} EGP. Enter the new amount — manager PIN required.
pos.discountRemoveHint: Remove the {{amount}} EGP discount from this cheque. Manager PIN required.
pos.discountAlreadyApplied: Discount already applied — edit or remove it first
auth.loginSubtitle: CEO and hub manager only. Cashiers and shift managers use the POS.
menu.title: Menu Manager
menu.readOnlyPosNote: Menus are read-only on POS terminals
menu.publishConfirmBody: Publishing pushes the {{venue}} menu to POS terminals immediately.
menu.venueHint: Each restaurant has its own menu. Edit categories and items, then publish when ready.
menu.selectRestaurant: Select a restaurant to edit its menu.
menu.modifierGroupsHint: Create options (size, add-ons) and attach them to items in the item editor.
menu.itemModifiersInlineHint: Add a modifier set here (e.g. Size, Toppings). Options are created with the item and the menu publishes automatically when you save.
menu.modifierGroupsLibraryHint: Optional library for modifier groups shared across many items. Most managers add modifiers directly when creating an item.
menu.publishMissingWarning: {{count}} item(s) still missing Arabic names. You can publish anyway.
menu.previewHint: Available items only, as cashiers see them after publish.
menu.autoTranslateHint: English names are copied as a starting point. Edit each suggestion before applying.
menu.autoTranslateEmpty: All menu names already have Arabic translations.
menu.hubManagerOnly: Only the hub manager can manage menus.
menu.noCategories: No categories yet. Add a category to start building this menu.
cheque.title: Cheques
cheque.ordersManageHint: Comp, void rounds, and reprints are managed in Orders.
cheque.selectCheque: Select a cheque to view details
cheque.draftPending: POS has an unsent round on this cheque — send or clear from the terminal first.
cheque.discountRemoveHint: Remove the {{amount}} EGP discount from this open cheque.
cheque.venueManagerAction: Applied immediately — logged for general manager review.
cheque.gmReviewActivity: Venue managers apply changes on POS. Review the Activity log.
cheque.refundHubHint: Processes immediately from the hub — no floor PIN required. Amount cannot exceed what was paid per method.
cheque.refundRequestHint: This sends a refund request to the hub manager for approval. The refund is not processed until approved.
cheque.refundPending: Refund request pending: {{amount}} EGP ({{method}}) — awaiting hub manager approval.
cheque.forceRefundHint: As hub manager you can process this refund immediately without a prior request.
approvals.title: Pending approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review and approve refund requests from POS shift managers.
approvals.hubManagerOnly: Only the hub manager can review approval requests.
approvals.hubOwnerOnly: Only the hub owner can review approval requests.
approvals.ceoOnly: Only the CEO can review approval requests.
approvals.rejectHint: Reject the refund request for cheque #{{number}}.
kds.title: Kitchen Display
kds.disabled: Kitchen display is disabled for this site
billing.title: Cross-venue billing
billing.subtitle: Choose which venues this anchor terminal may settle on a combined cross-venue cheque.
billing.anchorOnly: Only anchor venues can settle other venues. Set this venue's type to Anchor to enable cross-venue billing.
billing.noOtherVenues: No other venues to link yet.
crossVenue.groupLocked: Linked venues active for this table
crossVenue.title: Cross-venue settlement
crossVenue.orderSubtitle: Browse linked venue menus and build one combined order.
crossVenue.cartEmpty: Tap menu items to add them to the cart.
crossVenue.subtitle: Combine and settle open cheques from linked venues in one payment.
crossVenue.empty: No open cheques from linked venues right now.
commandPalette.title: Quick jump
crossVenue.discountPercentOnly: Cross-venue orders use percent discount only (applied to each venue).
crossVenue.discountApplyHint: Enter a percent — it applies to each venue's subtotal in this group.
crossVenue.discountEditHint: Current group discount: {{percent}}% (−{{amount}} total). Enter a new percent.
crossVenue.discountRemoveHint: Remove the {{amount}} group discount from all venues?
activity.title: Activity log
activity.subtitle: Review venue manager actions — discounts, refunds, voids, comps, and line transfers.
activity.subtitleFull: Immutable audit trail — manager actions, logins, config changes, menu publishes, and shift events.
activity.subtitleNeedsReview: Discounts, refunds, voids, comps, transfers, check reprints, force-closed shifts, and PIN resets.
activity.emptyNeedsReview: Nothing needs review in this period
activity.emptyHint: Actions appear here when a venue manager applies a discount, refund, void, comp, or transfer.
activity.hubManagerOnly: Only the general manager can view the activity log.
activity.hubStaffOnly: Only hub staff can view the activity log.
shifts.title: Shift management
shifts.subtitle: View open and closed cashier shifts, over/short, and cash reconciliation. Shifts are grouped by the day they opened.
shifts.selectShift: Select a shift to view the cash report
shifts.forceCloseHint: Close {{cashier}}'s shift with counted cash. Expected: {{expected}} EGP.
shifts.eodSubtitle: Daily totals for shifts that opened on this date (close time does not change the day).
users.title: Staff management
users.subtitle: Add cashiers and kitchen staff for your venue. Set PINs and RFID cards.
users.subtitleHub: Add cashiers and kitchen staff per venue. Floor managers run service on the POS.
users.subtitleOwner: Add owners, hub managers, and cashiers. Dashboard users sign in with a password; cashiers use a POS PIN.
users.subtitleManager: Add cashiers and floor managers per venue. Floor manager PINs authorize refunds and voids on the POS.
users.assignVenueHint: This staff member belongs to the selected venue.
users.assignVenueCashierHint: Cashiers sign in on POS terminals bound to this venue (e.g. Cafe or Restaurant).
users.venueManagerOnly: Only the hub manager can manage staff.
users.hubManagerOnly: Only the hub manager can manage staff.
health.title: System health
health.subtitle: Terminal connectivity, sync queue depth, and server status.
ops.title: Dev ops console
ops.subtitle: Live health, incidents, and real-time alerts for the engineering team.
ops.provision.title: Till provisioning
ops.provision.subtitle: Register POS terminals and copy credentials for the till setup wizard.
terminals.title: POS terminals
terminals.subtitle: Assign a static LAN IP to each till for offline peer sync. Mark one terminal as coordinator if needed. New tills are registered from the dev ops console.
terminals.coordinatorLanPlaceholder: Optional if different from assigned IP
terminals.notReportedYet: Agent has not reported a LAN address yet.
terminals.empty: No active terminals for this venue.
terminals.createSubtitle: Creates credentials for the till setup wizard on this venue.
terminals.createNameHint: Optional — defaults to POS-1, POS-2, etc.
terminals.credentialsSubtitle: Copy these values into the till setup wizard for {{name}}.
terminals.credentialsWarning: Terminal secret is shown once. Copy all fields before closing.
terminals.credentialsHint: On the till: open the setup wizard (or run setup.sh with --api-url, --terminal-id, --terminal-secret, --venue-id), test the connection, then finish setup.
venueConfig.title: Venue configuration
venueConfig.subtitle: Tax, printers, receipt template, and floor plan per venue.
venueConfig.hubManagerOnly: Only the hub manager can edit venue configuration.
venueConfig.restaurantsHint: Add restaurants here. Use Configure for name and type; set printers under Printers and build menus in Menu Manager.
venueConfig.restaurantCreated: {{name}} created. Set up its menu and printers next.
venueConfig.noRestaurants: No restaurants yet. Add your first one below.
venueConfig.tablesHint: One table label per line. Cashiers pick from this list on POS — no free typing.
receiptPreview.title: Receipts
receiptPreview.subtitle: Preview what prints on pay and pre-payment check. Sample data — not a live cheque.
receiptPreview.hint: Dine-in: only the restaurant copy prints on pay. Takeaway: customer and restaurant copies print on pay; no pre-payment check button.
venueConfig.receiptPrinterOptional: Leave blank to use kitchen printer
venueConfig.saved: Saved {{count}} change(s). Terminals receive updates via WebSocket.
hubTables.title: Hub table floor
hubTables.hint: One master list for all venues. Any cashier may serve any table; occupancy is shared across the hub.
hubTables.empty: No tables yet. Add labels cashiers can pick on POS.
hubTax.title: Hub tax & service
hubTax.hint: One tax and service rate for every venue — same as the hub table floor.
hubTax.saved: Hub tax and service settings saved.
setup.title: Till setup
setup.subtitle: Connect this terminal to your hub before taking orders.
setup.apiUrlHint: Your cloud hub address, e.g. https://hub.yourdomain.com
setup.githubUpdateTokenHint: Optional — fine-grained PAT with read access to Venue_POS releases (private repo auto-update).
setup.githubUpdateTokenKeep: Leave blank to keep existing token
setup.terminalIdHint: UUID from Dashboard → Settings → Terminals → Add terminal (copy from credentials dialog).
setup.invalidTerminalId: Terminal ID must be a UUID from Dashboard → Settings → Terminals.
setup.printerOptional: Kitchen printer IP (optional). USB receipt printer: plug in before running setup.sh on Ubuntu — installer creates CUPS queue VenueReceipt automatically. On Windows, USB is auto-detected. Cash drawer: RJ11 to printer kick port; use Drawer in the POS header during a shift.
setup.reentrySubtitle: Enter floor manager PIN to change till settings.
setup.saveRequiresTest: Run Test connection on the Terminal step before saving.
features.title: Hub features
features.subtitle: Enable or disable POS capabilities for all terminals. Changes apply on next feature sync.
features.manualCardPaymentHint: Cashiers can record external terminal card payments on POS.
features.kdsEnabledHint: Show kitchen display app and item status WebSocket events.
features.lineTransferHint: Floor manager can move fired lines between tables on POS.
features.discountsHint: Apply discounts before payment (floor manager PIN).
features.refundsHint: Refund paid cheques from POS (floor manager PIN).
features.autoReceiptPrintHint: Print customer receipt via local agent when configured.
features.crossVenueBillingHint: Anchor POS Cross-sell toggle and group settlement.
